title: Ham and egg beauty
excerpt: Sometimes you get guests you'd love to impress just a little bit – without too much effort. Well, here it is: Ham and egg beauty – serves 6 6 slices of ham butter to grease the pan, or Spray and Cook 2 teaspoons parsley, finely chopped ( snip it with scissors …

seo.title: Ham and egg beauty - Marinda Kook

html:
Sometimes you get guests you’d love to impress just a little bit – without too much effort. Well, here it is:

Ham and egg beauty – serves 6

  • 6 slices of ham
  • butter to grease the pan, or Spray and Cook
  • 2 teaspoons parsley, finely chopped ( snip it with scissors inside a cup)
  • 1 chopped onion ( put a metal spoon in your mouth so your eyes don't water)
  • 6 eggs
  • 200 ml plain white yogurt
  • 250 ml grated cheddar cheese
  • red pepper (cayenne)

NOW:

  1. Grease your muffin pan or spray it with Spray and Cook.
  2. Line each hollow with a slice of ham.
  3. Fry the onion quickly in a bit of butter and divide it between the six hollows lined with ham.
  4. Whisk the eggs and add the yogurt. Also mix in the parsley.
  5. Pour the egg/yogurt mixture into your 6 ham cups.
  6. Sprinkle cheese over each portion and shake a little red pepper over the top. (this is optional)
  7. Bake for 30 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius.
  8. Turn the little dishes out onto each person's plate and serve with a lovely slice of toast.

You can use individual dishes, cups or muffin tins to bake these in.

It looks so pretty if you turn it out onto rocket leaves with half a rosa tomato beside it.
